subcodes.first_line: O son of him whose tongue hath testified to His sanctification in eternity, that which thou didst write hath been seen and understood [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بن من شهد لسان القدم بتقدیسه آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید مشهود و معلوم گردید از
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
